examples.title: Pseudocode: Image Negation
examples.description: Negates an image by reversing intensity values
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ImageNegation
INPUT: image
OUTPUT: negated_image

BEGIN
 FOR EACH pixel IN image
 negated_pixel = MAX_INTENSITY - pixel
 ADD negated_pixel TO negated_image
 END FOR
 RETURN negated_image
END
examples.explanation: Iterates over each pixel in the input image, calculates its negated value by subtracting it from the maximum intensity, and adds the result to the output image.

examples.title: Python: Image Negation
examples.code:
def negate_image(image):
 max_intensity = 255
 negated_image = [max_intensity - pixel for pixel in image]
 return negated_image
examples.explanation: Uses a list comprehension to create a new image with negated intensity values.

examples.title: C: Image Negation
examples.explanation: Iterates over the input image array, negating each pixel value in place.

examples.title: Java: Image Negation
examples.explanation: Creates a new byte array to store the negated image, then iterates over the input image, calculating the negated value for each pixel.
